title: hibiscus schinzii
intro: Hibiscus schinzii is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing blood pressure, cholesterol levels, and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Hibiscus schinzii can be found in teas, capsules, and infusions, which are often used to aid in weight loss, improve liver function, and boost the immune system.
